subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Desired One, Who is worthy and befitting, for from the clouds of loving-kindness the rains of mercy descend upon the goodly earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که از سحاب عنایت امطار رحمت بر اراضی طیبه
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @praise and encouragement, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
